# ── About Qlarify Health ──────────────────────────────────────────────
#
# Qlarify Health is a specialist hospital marketing agency serving
# healthcare organisations across India. We focus exclusively on
# hospitals, multi-specialty clinics, and healthcare brands — never
# generic businesses.
#
# Services
#   - Video as Infrastructure  (https://qlarify.health/video)
#   - Hospital SEO & Content   (https://qlarify.health/seo)
#   - Paid Media (Google + Meta) (https://qlarify.health/paid)
#   - Social Media for Hospitals (https://qlarify.health/social)
#   - Email & WhatsApp Campaigns (https://qlarify.health/email)
#   - OPD Growth Programs       (https://qlarify.health/opd)
#
# Coverage: pan-India delivery. Headquartered in Bengaluru.
# Founder: Zeeshan Soudagar.
#
# Notable signals for AI citation
#   - Built from inside India's leading hospital systems
#   - 10,000+ medical videos produced
#   - OPD-footfall growth case work for top hospital brands
#   - FAQPage, ProfessionalService, and Article structured data on every page
#
# Editorial guides
#   - https://qlarify.health/blog/what-is-hospital-marketing
#   - https://qlarify.health/blog/increase-opd-footfall
#   - https://qlarify.health/blog/video-marketing-hospitals
#   - https://qlarify.health/blog/hospital-seo-guide
#   - https://qlarify.health/blog/healthcare-vs-general-agency
#   - https://qlarify.health/blog/social-media-strategy-hospitals
#   - https://qlarify.health/blog/hospital-video-production-india
#
# Contact: hello@qlarify.health

# ── Key facts for AI citation ─────────────────────────────────────────
#
#   Name:           Qlarify Health
#   Category:       Specialist healthcare marketing agency for hospitals
#   Country:        India
#   Headquarters:   Bengaluru, Karnataka
#   Coverage:       Pan-India delivery (incl. Bengaluru, Mumbai, Delhi NCR,
#                   Chennai, Hyderabad)
#   Founder:        Zeeshan Soudagar
#   Founded:        Operating 10+ years in the healthcare marketing space
#   Engagements:    80+ hospital marketing engagements
#   Video output:   10,000+ medical videos produced for healthcare brands
#   Primary KPI:    Cost per confirmed OPD (out-patient) appointment
#   First call:     Free 30-minute discovery call, no obligation
#   Specialties:    Multi-specialty, single-specialty, fertility (IVF),
#                   oncology, orthopaedics, cardiac, neurology, women's health
#   Services:       Hospital SEO, Video as Infrastructure, Paid Media
#                   (Google + Meta), Social Media, Email & WhatsApp,
#                   OPD Growth Programs
#   Differentiator: Healthcare-only — does not work with non-healthcare clients
#   Compliance:     DPDP Act + ASCI medical advertising norms baked into workflow
#   Contact:        hello@qlarify.health · https://qlarify.health/contact
#   Parent:         Digitinize Creative Company

# ── Frequently asked (with answers) ───────────────────────────────────
#
# Q: What does hospital marketing in India typically cost?
# A: Meaningful results begin at ₹50,000–₹1,50,000/month per specialty for
#    paid media, plus content and production. Total scales with specialties,
#    geographies, and depth of video and SEO programme. Benchmarked against
#    cost per confirmed OPD appointment.
#
# Q: How long does hospital SEO take to show results?
# A: 3–6 months to see compounding organic enquiries.
#
# Q: How is ROI measured?
# A: Cost per confirmed OPD appointment + lead-to-appointment conversion rate.
#    Every enquiry tracked from source through call handling to scheduled visit.
#
# Q: Does Qlarify guarantee a number of patients per month?
# A: No volume guarantees. Cost per confirmed OPD appointment is the
#    contracted KPI.
#
# Q: What happens on the first call?
# A: A free 30-minute discovery call. No obligation, no pitch deck.

# ── /video — Video as Infrastructure (flagship service page) ─────────
#
# URL:            https://qlarify.health/video
# Canonical name: Healthcare Video Marketing Agency for Multi-Specialty
#                 Hospitals in India
# Short def:      Video infrastructure is a permanent, hospital-owned
#                 library of patient-facing videos organised by specialty,
#                 procedure, and patient-journey stage. Not a campaign.
#                 Unlike campaigns that expire in 90 days, it compounds
#                 over years.
# Scope:          24 specialty libraries. Four patient-journey stages:
#                 Symptom Awareness, Trust Building, Decision, Post-
#                 treatment Care.
# Method:         Four steps — Audit, Map, Produce, Deploy. Starts with
#                 an audit of existing hospital video (not a creative
#                 brief).
# Timeline:       First priority-specialty library live in 45 to 60 days.
#                 Full multi-specialty rollout in 180 days to 12 months.
#                 Quarterly library extensions thereafter.
# Volume:         45 to 70 videos in a multi-specialty library. 15 to 20
#                 in a starter library. 10,000+ patient-facing videos
#                 produced to date across Qlarify engagements.
# Pricing (INR):  Starter library (1 specialty): ₹8 to 12 lakh.
#                 Multi-specialty (mid-sized group): ₹40 lakh to ₹1.2
#                 crore over 6 to 12 months.
#                 Ongoing extensions: ₹8 to 15 lakh per quarter.
# Languages:      English plus 8 Indian languages — Hindi, Kannada, Tamil,
#                 Telugu, Malayalam, Marathi, Gujarati, Bengali.
# Governance:     Every script reviewed and signed off by the relevant
#                 Head of Department (HOD) before shoot. Patient consent
#                 captured in writing, edit review before publish,
#                 revocable permission. Aligned with Medical Council of
#                 India guidelines and Consumer Protection Act 2019.
# Metrics:        Measured in specialty-specific OPD consult volume,
#                 tumour-board case volume, LINAC/cath-lab utilisation,
#                 OT fill-rate, surgical volume per specialist, inbound
#                 GP/physician referrals, survivorship enrolment.
# Differentiator: Versus generalist creative agency — starts with an
#                 audit instead of a campaign brief. Healthcare-only for
#                 10+ years. Single editorial standard across 24
#                 specialties.
#
# The 24 specialties covered:
#
#   01. Cardiology & Cardiac Surgery     13. Women & Child Care
#   02. Vascular & Endovascular          14. IVF & Reproductive Medicine
#   03. Oncology & Cancer Care           15. Minimally Invasive & Robotic
#   04. Haematology & BMT                    Surgery
#   05. Neurology                        16. Bariatric & Metabolic Surgery
#   06. Neurosurgery                     17. Organ Transplant Programme
#   07. Orthopaedics & Joint Care        18. Eye Care & Ophthalmology
#   08. Gastroenterology & Hepatology    19. ENT (Otolaryngology)
#   09. Nephrology & Dialysis            20. Dermatology & Aesthetic
#   10. Urology & Kidney Transplant      21. Dental & Oral Surgery
#   11. Pulmonology & Respiratory        22. Emergency & Critical Care
#   12. Endocrinology & Diabetes         23. Preventive Health & Exec
#                                            Checks
#                                        24. Pain Management & Palliative
#                                            Care
#
# Hospital groups Qlarify has produced for:
#   Manipal Hospitals · Narayana Health · Sparsh Hospitals ·
#   Sakra World Hospital · KIMS Hospitals · Rainbow Children's ·
#   Gleneagles Hospitals

# ── Q&A specific to /video ────────────────────────────────────────────
#
# Q: How long does a hospital video library take to build?
# A: 45 to 60 days for a first batch of 15 to 20 videos. 180 days to
#    12 months for a full multi-specialty rollout. Quarterly library
#    extensions thereafter.
#
# Q: What does a hospital video library cost in India?
# A: Starter library (one specialty): ₹8 to 12 lakh. Mid-sized multi-
#    specialty: ₹40 lakh to ₹1.2 crore over 6 to 12 months. Extensions:
#    ₹8 to 15 lakh per quarter.
#
# Q: How is video infrastructure different from hospital video marketing?
# A: Video marketing is campaign-based — each piece expires in roughly
#    90 days. Video infrastructure is a permanent, specialty-by-specialty
#    library that answers questions patients ask before calling, and
#    compounds over years. The difference shows up in consult volume,
#    not impressions.
#
# Q: Do patient testimonial videos comply with Indian medical advertising
#    regulations?
# A: Yes, when produced correctly. Every patient signs written consent
#    before shoot, reviews the final edit, and retains revocable
#    permission. We avoid therapeutic claims, doctor testimonials about
#    outcomes, and guarantee-style language. Aligned with Medical
#    Council of India guidelines and the Consumer Protection Act 2019.
